name: Zeidman's Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn and jewelry lender operating in Detroit since 1923. Offers collateral-based loans and buys/sells luxury jewelry and watches.
description_long:
Zeidman's Jewelry & Loan has operated as a family-owned pawn and lending business in the Detroit metropolitan area for over 100 years, with four generations of the Zeidman family managing operations. The company markets itself as "Michigan's Largest Jewelry & Loan" and maintains a staff of over 60 employees with multi-generational expertise in the pawn and jewelry lending industry.

The company's primary services include collateral-based loans secured by jewelry, watches, and other valuables, as well as the purchase and sale of luxury jewelry and timepieces. Their inventory features high-end luxury brands including Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, and Cartier. Customers can obtain loans by pledging jewelry as collateral or sell items outright. The website indicates they can structure loans "as large as the biggest corporate lending institutions and small enough to suit any individual."

Zeidman's distinguishes itself through longevity (operating since 1923), scale (self-described as Michigan's largest in this category), and inventory curation focused on authenticated luxury timepieces and jewelry. Customer reviews highlight honest pricing, quality merchandise inspection/servicing, and personalized service from named staff members. The company operates both retail jewelry sales and pawn lending from the same location.

As a pawn lender, Zeidman's serves customers needing quick liquidity against collateral without credit checks or income verification requirements. The primary limitation is that all loans require valuable jewelry or watches as collateral—this is fundamentally a secured lending model, not an unsecured personal loan. Interest rates and specific loan terms are not disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 100 years in business (since 1923) with established reputation and family continuity
Large inventory of authenticated luxury watches and jewelry (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Cartier)
Can provide loans "as large as the biggest corporate lending institutions" with flexible sizing
No credit check or income verification required for collateral-based loans
Staff of 60+ employees with multi-generational expertise and named sales representatives
Watches described as "serviced/checked as needed" before sale, indicating quality control
Both online sales and in-person lending available (313-567-4444 contact)
cons: Requires valuable jewelry/watches as collateral—not an option for customers without such assets
Loan terms, interest rates, and APR not disclosed on website; customers must call or visit
No information about loan payoff terms, grace periods, or consequences of default
Inventory frequently shows items as "Sold Out," limiting availability of specific pieces
Located only in Detroit metropolitan area; appears to be single-location or limited regional operation
best_for: People with valuable jewelry or luxury watches who need immediate cash without credit checks
Collectors and luxury watch buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned pieces from established dealer
Borrowers who want to retain ownership of collateral through structured loan repayment
Individuals who prefer working with a long-established local business with consistent history
diagnosis: Zeidman's is best for customers with valuable jewelry or luxury watches who need quick cash without credit qualification and prefer working with an established, family-owned lender. The critical caveat is that this is strictly a collateral-based pawn model—borrowers must pledge items of significant value, and specific loan terms, interest rates, and repayment periods are not publicly disclosed and require direct contact.
services: Collateral-based loans secured by jewelry and watches
Purchase and sale of luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Cartier)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
